cookie_consent.title: Your privacy is our priority.
cookie_consent.bar_text: We use cookies to ensure the site works properly and to improve your experience. Click "Accept" or "Decline", or fine-tune your choice via "Manage cookies".
cookie_consent.modal_text: You can accept or decline each cookie below, then save your choice. Cookies required for the site to function remain always active.

validation.password_min: Password must be at least 8 characters.

file.invalid_type: File format not accepted (PDF, JPG, PNG, DOC, DOCX).
